titleStmt.title: SII 18.195: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 195. (B.K. No. 7 of 1934-35.) BENAKANKOṆḌA, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up near the southern entrance of the Kalamēs11vara temple.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in the 13th year of the reign of Vīra-Ballāḷadēva, Dundubhi, Vaiśākha śu. 15, Monday, Saṅkrānti. Palaeographically the record may be assigned roughly to the 12th century A.D. and hence the Ballāḷla of this record may be identified with Ballāḷa II. In his reign the cyclic year Dundubhi corresponds to A.D. 1202-3. In that year the given details correspond to A.D. 1202, April 8, Monday f.d.t. ·06. The month was Adhika Vaiśākha.

It registers a grant of land and house-site made by the Prabhu of Beḷugali and others to Chauḍeya-Nāyaka and others for effecting repairs to the tank of Harakaṭa. The grant was made during the time of Kumāra Vīra-Vikramāditya, the son of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Jagadāḷa Chaṭṭamadēva. The land-measure Gaṅgana-ghaḷe is mentioned.
The record, which contains many scribal errors has been engraved very carelessly.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: The text is corrupt. It is given as it is.
div.p:
© namaḥstuṁgaśirastuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷō
kyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē varaphēnānē
kasuṁbhadubahaḷatarataraṁgaḷoṁdoṁdanoṁdaṁ bhara
diṁdaṁ taḷpoyye mēliṁgogedu poḷeva sīrmmuttiveṁbaṁte
sūsutire vōroṁtturbi tūrppanigaḷasadaḷaṁ celuvanāḷvattu kū
rmōdhurapāṭhīnādibhāsvadugaḷagaḷitaguṇadhvānaraudraṁ samudraṁ .
Aṁteniva kuṁtaḷōrvvīkāṁtege patiyenisi vairinripakuḷaviḷayō
grāṁtakanesedaṁ dōrvvaḷakauṁtēyaṁ ballāḷadēvanūrjjitatēja . vacana
tatupādapadumōpajīvigaḷumapa śrīmanumahāmaṇḍḍaḷēsvaraṁ jaga
dāḷa caṭṭamadēvana prabhāvōṁnatiyeṁtaṁdaḍe . sāhasadoḷu dharādharadha
raṁ bhujasauryyanijapratāpasaṁdōhadoḷarjanaṁ baḷavirōdhinripāḷasama
stasaiṁnyakabyuhamanāvagaṁ tavipacchaṁṇḍaparākramaveṁdaḍī raṇōścā
ha jayāṁganāsakta caṭṭanripāḷanoḷāridirccuvaru . tatputranaṁpadi is written above the line.
śrīmanumahāmaṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ kumāra vīravikramadityadēvarasara prabhāvō
natiyenttendaḍe . yalaraṁbinikṣucāpada balamillade nijaviḷāsagarbba
da baladiṁ lalaneyargge vikramāṁkaṁ kaliyugamadanaṁ vivēkalakṣmīsadananu .
yele maruḷe puliya mīseyanoladuyyulanāḍuvantte boppanri
pāḷaṁgalagaṇasu seṇasugiṇaseṁdulukuva maṁḍḍaḷikaroḷa
re bhūmaṁṇḍaladoḷu . jagadoḷagatyayapūrvvadiṭhamēṁ diṭa yāvu
du svāmitīrtta yī yugadoḷge mūrttigoṁḍeseva gaṁṇḍamatīrtta
vāgi kai mugiyaluvēḍa baṇṇinaluvēḍa nīṁ naguta saraṇyanaṁ bagadu
bēḷvadanīvanu dāsivarmmanu . stiratējaṁ puṁṇnyapuṁjaṁ sujanajanama
nōjaṁ yasaḥśrīsamājaṁ dharegelaṁ tāne nallaṁ karedīvaṁ Ālimuroḍeyaṁ
samaramukhadasagrīvanudyatuprabhāva . turagārūḍhaprauḍhige dore yāru
vigrahavinōdadoḷu dānavinōdiyadirājananabhivarṇnikuṁ dinapatēja
nanāsritakaplabhūjanaṁ . manucaritaṁ caritravinujātana naṁniye naṁni dha
rmmanaṁdanana guṇaṁ guṇaṁ divijamaṁtriya maṁtrame maṁtravaṁjanātane
yanudagrasāhasame sāhasameṁdu dharitri mallirājanabhivarṇnikuṁ
dinapatējananāśritaka(r)lpabhūjanaṁ . Antā prabhugaḷuṁ hanni hiṭṭuṁ samastu
prajegaḷuṁ kṣīrōdhikarāgi dharmmamaṁ yudharipalu cauḍeyanāyakaṁgū
ḍi tammamuvargge hēḷaleṁtteṁdaḍe . vittaṁ vīraṁ vijayādityaṁ saṁdavaniyoḷage muṁ
nina viṭarantittudanīyalu dēvaṇanottaṁbada gaṁṇḍanendu nuḍiyudu lōka .
vanacana carana caritavenisida vinateya sutanaṁte bhūmiyoḍeyara manamaṁ
piḍiyaccuviḍiye cauḍeyanadanavadhārisi manōnurāgadinittaru .
raṇaraṁga�jayanenisida dhanuviddeyoḷagrajanenisida vanitānivahadoḷu
sobaganenisida guṇa rallayanāyakaṁge samanenaloḷarē . bhujabalada kali samaṁ
nyuthanijatējada mūrttiyeṁdu pogaḷvudu lōkaṁ sobaginoḷu kāmane
nisida budha kācayanāyakaṁge samanenaloḷarē © svasti śrīmatu pra
tāpacakravartti vīraballāḷadēvavarṣada 13 ne duṁdubhisaṁvatsarada vaiśākhasu pau
rṇnami . sōsaṁkrāṁntibyatīpāta kūḍida puṁṇyadinadaṁdu beḷugaliya prabha dāsi
vūroḍeya Ālimūroḍeya mallūroḍeya Ādimūroḍeya haṁnnihiṭṭumukhyavā
gi . cauḍeyanāyaka kāceyanāyaka ralleyanāyakana nobhāgakke maiduna lakmanoḍeya
yintivargga harakaṭada keṟeya caṁdrārkkasthāraṁbaraṁ baliṣṭamāḍuvaṁtāgi cikereyoḷa
ge gaṁgana ghaḷeyalu mattaru mūṟu Ā ghaḷeyalu keṟekeḷage gadde kaṁbaṁ 30 vu
ra naḍuve mūvattu keyya maneyumaṁ yittī mānyamaṁ sarvvābādhepariharavāgi
caṁdrākkatāraṁbaraṁ salisuttiralanaṁtta phala yi dharmmamanāvanādaḍeyaḷi daḍe
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā hyō harati vasuṁdharā śaṣṭirvvaruśa saha
śrāṇi miṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . ©
Digital edition of SII 18.195 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
